SLB · APG GeoUnit · Western Australia

Jandakot Base HSE Induction

Complete this induction before you arrive on site. It covers everything you need to work safely at the Jandakot facility — emergency procedures, PPE, site movement, lifting operations, permits and environment.

~15 minTO COMPLETE
8MODULES
12 moVALIDITY

On completion you'll receive a dated certificate of completion. Contractors must still be briefed by their reporting supervisor on task-specific HARC and STEP-7 requirements.
